title: Flintronic 2 Way Brass Hose Splitter, 3/4" Tap Garden Hose Connector, Y Valve Tap Connector with Individual On/of, Faucet Splitter for Garden, Outdoor, Lawn, Courtyard, Kitchen
features: 【HIGH-QUALITY & DURABLE MATERIAL】Our brass hose diverter is made of heavy-duty high-quality brass, which is pressure-proof, explosion-proof, corrosion-resistant and oxidation-resistant. It is durable and will not turn black after long-term use, and its service life can last for decades. It is ideal for heavy-duty applications in the garden.

【ADJUSTABLE FLOW CONTROL】Each channel has an independent switch, which can be switched freely to control the water flow size without being affected by the other side. You can use the faucet diverter as a garden hose pressure regulator by simply adjusting the adjustment lever to provide the perfect flow for your water supply system. The ergonomic handle makes it easier for you to turn the water valve on and off.

【TIGHT CONNECTION WITHOUT LEAKAGE】The two-way heavy-duty water pipe diverter adopts threaded connection, which can be firmly connected to the faucet or water pipe. Even if it is used for a long time, the water inlet and outlet will not fall off. The built-in leak-proof gasket prevents water from leaking easily.

【EASY TO INSTALL & USE】The installation of the external faucet diverter is very simple. Just connect it to the faucet and tighten the nut, no additional tape is needed. The nut can be rotated 360 degrees, so it can be installed in a small space. No professional plumber is required, you can install it yourself. Besides, using se our garden Y Valve hose splitter to split one stream of water into two, allowing your hose to do more and improve your work efficiency.

【WIDELY APPLICATION】Our garden hose diverter has two connectors and fits all standard 3/4" hoses. The water hose diverter connects to standard 3/4" faucets and is suitable for high pressure water and hot and cold water connections. Such as dishwashers, washing machines, garden hoses, water purifiers, water tanks, etc.
description: Product Description WATER VALVE USAGE STATUS DISPLAY Close Valve Water Comes Out At The Same Time Water Comes Out On The Right, Closed On The Left Water Comes Out On The Left, Closed On The Right Transform 1 Faucet Into 2 Independent High-Flow Water Sources Two water sources can be used for different scenarios, eliminating the waiting time for switching between uses. The high-flow design speeds up water use and is suitable for tasks that need to be completed quickly. Easily Turn Valve Handle The ergonomic handle makes it easier to open and close the water valve. Leak-Free Equipped with high quality full port ball valves for tight closure. Rust-Free All heavy-duty brass material, solid and durable. 360° Rotation It is easy to tug and pull the hoses in all directions.
